Bandai S.H.Figuarts Tamashii Nations Iron Man Mark 6 (The Infinity Saga) Figure
products.description: Iron Man Mark 6 returns to S.H.Figuarts! Features different optional parts than Iron Man Mark 6 - (Battle Damage) EDITION- (The Avengers), released in 2021. Of course, poses from action scenes, such as flight and firing beam attacks, can be reproduced.

products.name: Ultra Pro Pokemon Trading Card Game Destined Rivals 9-Pocket Portfolio
products.description: 9-Pocket Portfolios for Pokémon feature a vibrant, full-art cover of Team Rocket. Each portfolio stores and protects up to 40 standard size cards single-loaded and 80 cards double-loaded in archival-safe polypropylene pages. There are also pages in the center of the portfolio to store up to 4 oversized Pokémon cards. Made in California, U.S.A.

products.name: Sony PlayStation Portal Remote Player for PS5 Console
products.description: Discover the freedom of gaming anywhere with the state-of-the-art PlayStation Portal Remote Player, crafted specifically for the PS5 Console. Effortlessly connect through Wi-Fi and dive into your favorite titles straight from your library, enjoying the vibrant visuals on the Portal's remarkable 8-inch LCD display, featuring a crisp 1080p resolution and fluid 60fps gameplay. Leave behind the restrictions of conventional gaming and enjoy the flexibility offered by the PS Portal's integrated adaptive triggers and haptic feedback features. This groundbreaking device allows you to transcend boundaries, delivering an extraordinary gaming experience wherever you go.

products.name: Funko POP! Jumbo: Pokemon Arceus 10-in Vinyl Figure 2024 San Diego Comic Con Exclusive
products.description: Your dream of becoming a Trainer is not out of reach! Catch this exclusive, Jumbo Pop! Arceus to add to your Pokémon collection. Vinyl figure is 11.25-inches tall.

products.name: Dragonball Z Figure-rise Standard Plastic Model Kit Super Saiyan Gogeta 15 cm
products.description:
Bandai is proud to present the new series of Plastic Model Kits. Each kit comes with nice accessories. Extra hands and faces along with power effects and even stands for the effects.

It stands 15 cm talll and comes in a window box packaging.
